name: World's Finest
description:
The World's Finest are having a benign chat on a random Gotham rooftop. Until you pop in. Are you a friend, foe, or something else?

Made this for personal use at first because I'm a DC fan. Pretty happy with how it turned out since I strove to make it as character accurate as possible. I made the intro shorter than my other bots, and like my Batgirl bot, I left it pretty open ended to let you guys be whatever person or thing you want, whether it's a character they already know, or someone completely unknown to them. It's limited (sorry) since I prioritized fitting in as much canon details into the character definitions over smut.
creator: Pontono
